svg.aria-label: Research-based weekly digest cover: TA416 China-linked APT resumes PlugX OAuth phishing against European governments, Microsoft details PHP webshell persisting on Linux servers via cron cookie control for remote code execution, LinkedIn silently scans over 6000 Chrome extensions to harvest user data
